summary: Full e2e testing of Subscription/PIX BR Code feature + Demanda Pública modal. Backend pytest 10/10 passed: status, start (BR Code + CRC16 valid + valid PNG base64 QR), confirm-payment (pending_verification), admin endpoints correctly 403 for non-admin. Frontend: /assinatura renders 3-column layout (sidebar with menu items, center 'Gerenciar meu perímetro' with raio slider, right orange card 'Passe para a velocidade superior' with bullets + 'Eu me inscrevo' button). 'Eu me inscrevo' triggers POST /api/subscription/start (200) and opens PIX modal showing '3 DIAS GRÁTIS' badge, R$ 35,90, QR PNG, BR Code copia-e-cola, Copiar btn, 'Já paguei' which triggers /confirm-payment (200). FeedPage: '+' green Publicar button opens centralized Demanda pública modal with all elements (description+0/250 counter, 3 photo slots, address, budget select, category select, 'Postar minha demanda' green button, toggle Demanda paga | Ajuda Voluntária). Toggle 'Ajuda Voluntária' navigates to /volunteers as required. Form submit creates post via POST /api/posts (200) and closes modal. Top nav includes 'Assinatura' link.

issues: Console accessibility warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen reader users' on both modals - add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle for a11y compliance (minor a11y, does not affect functionality).
When toast 'Login bem-sucedido!' is visible (~3s) it overlaps the top nav center icons and can intercept clicks for power-users right after login - not a real bug; visual overlap only.

action_items: (Optional / low priority) Add a VisuallyHidden DialogTitle to demanda-modal and pix-modal to silence Radix Dialog a11y console warnings.
(Optional) Reduce toast overlap with top nav on /home post-login (auto-dismiss faster or place toast below header).
critical_code_review_comments: pix_generator.py is clean and spec-compliant (CRC16-CCITT poly 0x1021, init 0xFFFF; TLV fields 00/01/26/52/53/54/58/59/60/62/63). Verified BR Code passes self-CRC check (196 chars, starts 000201, valid 4-hex suffix). QR PNG is valid (signature 89 50 4E 47).
SubscriptionPage uses inline styles for layout - acceptable since under 700 lines.
FeedPage.js is 718 lines - approaching the 700 line threshold. Recommend splitting Demanda Publica modal into a <DemandaPublicaModal/> component for maintainability.
/api/subscription/start is idempotent (reuses existing sub for user) - good. trial_ends_at preserved on re-call.
Admin endpoints correctly check current_user.role == 'admin' with 403. Untested with real admin user (no admin in seeded creds).
subscription/confirm-payment correctly returns 404 when no subscription exists for the user.
test_credentials: maria@test.com / test123 (migrant), carlos@test.com / test123 (volunteer). No admin user available - admin endpoints only tested for 403 path.
seed_data_creation: Created subscription record for maria@test.com (status=pending_verification after test) and one TEST_DEMANDA_PUB post via POST /api/posts. Both persist in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription/PIX feature complete & functional. BR Code is valid EMV/BCB-compliant (CRC16-CCITT verified). PIX is static QR (no provider integration needed). To test admin activate endpoint with real admin: directly update a user's role to 'admin' in MongoDB or seed an admin via DB. Maria has a pending_verification subscription left over - admin can mark it active to test that path. FeedPage modal opens with real-user clicks; Playwright .click(force=True) on nav-publish-desktop occasionally needs page.evaluate() click due to nested div hit-test, but this does NOT affect real users.
